headline: Bezos’ Physical AI Lab Has Closed Round at $38 Billion Value
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Project Prometheus, the artificial intelligence lab that Amazon.com Inc. founder Jeff Bezos is leading with Google veteran Vik Bajaj, has closed a $10 billion funding round that values the company at roughly $38 billion, according to a person familiar with the situation.Most Read from BloombergAnthropic’s Mythos Model Is Being Accessed by Unauthorized UsersInside Alex Cooper’s Unwell: Tears, Screaming and Employees Looking for the ExitTrump Encourages Companies Not to Seek Tariff

headline: How The Fresenius SE KGaA (XTRA:FRE) Investment Story Is Evolving With Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: The fair value estimate for Fresenius SE KGaA was trimmed slightly from €55.90 to €55.47 per share, a modest adjustment of about €0.43. This shift lines up with Street research that combines higher targets from bullish houses and €1 to €2 cuts from more cautious analysts, leaving the overall picture more balanced than before. As you read on, you will see how these different calls shape the evolving narrative around risk, reward, and what to watch next. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: JPMorgan Readies Fresh Private Credit Push After Needling Market
summary: (Bloomberg) -- After years weighing how to dive deeper into private credit, JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s $4.3 trillion asset manager is committing to a strategy that will plow tens of billions of dollars into loans sourced by the firm’s commercial bankers.Most Read from BloombergAnthropic’s Mythos Model Is Being Accessed by Unauthorized UsersInside Alex Cooper’s Unwell: Tears, Screaming and Employees Looking for the ExitTrump Encourages Companies Not to Seek Tariff RefundsAlex Cooper, Husband Skip Tea

headline: How Cisco Systems (CSCO) Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Views And New AI Moves
summary: Cisco Systems has seen its Fair Value price target move slightly, with the model shifting from US$89.04 to US$89.09. That small change sits alongside mixed analyst commentary, where some firms such as JPMorgan and Citi have raised targets while others, including Erste Group, have turned more cautious on margins and rating. As you read on, you will see how these differing views and small model tweaks can matter when you are tracking Cisco's evolving story. Analyst Price Targets don't always...
